productDisplayName: Stens by Enroute Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteIndulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from stens by enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic shoe horn.Product DetailsBlack shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingPadded footbed and innerEVA midsole for impact protectionTPU outsole with stacked heel and embedded lugs on the midfootMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
